title: nomotheteo #3549
definition:
1) to enact laws
    1a) laws are enacted or prescribed for one, to be legislated for,
        furnished with laws
 2) to sanction by law, enact
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to enact laws
    1a) laws are enacted or prescribed for one, to be legislated for,
        furnished with laws
 2) to sanction by law, enact

    NASB:  to make law, to ordain by law:
